checks.description: When EMPTY flag is asserted, a read operation must not alter dataOut and must keep EMPTY asserted.
notes: Conservative guardrail for illegal read on empty buffer.
checks.pass_condition: If EMPTY=1 before a read (RW=1, EN=1), then after the operation EMPTY remains 1 and dataOut does not change.
checks.trigger_condition: When EN=1, RW=1 (read) and EMPTY is observed high.

checks.pass_condition: After a legal write (EN=1, RW=0) the EMPTY flag must eventually become 0 and FULL may become 1 when capacity is reached; the change need not be immediate but must be observable within a bounded number of clock cycles.
checks.trigger_condition: When a write stimulus is applied in case basic_001.
